case_title: GUANG QING HE VS. BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORINA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HE, GUANG QING AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORINA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
